name: vamp
description: Monorepo for Vamp, a collaborative music-making app

scripts.vercel-build: npm run schema && npm run codegen && npm run build && npm run copy:client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @vamp/shared && npm run dev --workspace server
scripts.test:e2e:stack: VITE_GRAPHQL_URI=/graphql npm run build -w @vamp/app && npm run test:e2e:server -w @vamp/server
